key_hits: All 6 components correctly identified (Web Client, API Gateway FastAPI, Auth Service, Worker Queue, Postgres, Redis)
Colors correct: light blue, orange, light green, pink
Protocols correct: HTTPS (Web Client to API Gateway), gRPC (API Gateway to Auth Service / Worker Queue)
Shape semantics captured: rectangles for services, ovals for databases
Verbatim text listed accurately
key_misses: Did not mention the dangling/phantom third gRPC line in the middle (notable design quirk)
Describes the gRPC arrow as splitting into 'two paths' but ground truth notes three lines
judgments.justification: Excellent comprehensive description with verbatim text, accurate colors/shapes/protocols. Only missed the subtle dangling third gRPC line that the ground truth flagged as a design quirk.
